professional_summary.text: Cloud Infrastructure & Engineering Leader with 16+ years driving enterprise-scale technical strategy, cloud operations, and FinOps governance. Proven expertise in scaling high-performing engineering organizations, aligning multi-million-dollar Azure infrastructure roadmaps with corporate objectives, and mitigating operational risk. A strategic partner to C-level stakeholders, specializing in building resilient, compliant, and cost-optimized global cloud platforms.

bullets.text: Directed enterprise Azure architecture strategy, aligning cloud resiliency roadmaps with executive business objectives.
Scaled the cloud engineering practice by establishing rigorous technical hiring frameworks and mentoring talent.
Governed HA/DR and risk mitigation strategies, ensuring enterprise platforms met stringent global SLA requirements.
Championed strategic infrastructure investments, successfully securing roadmap alignment from senior leadership stakeholders.
Led and scaled a high-performing infrastructure operations organization supporting global business-critical workloads.
Governed enterprise cloud expenditure, enforcing strategic FinOps frameworks without compromising operational performance.
Directed incident response strategy, establishing data-driven observability platforms that reduced MTTR by 40%.
Defined infrastructure governance standards, ensuring highly scalable Azure deployments met strict enterprise compliance.
Orchestrated disaster recovery strategy, securing business continuity and zero data loss for core applications.
Directed hybrid cloud migration initiatives, optimizing enterprise infrastructure stability and subscription resource utilization.
Accelerated engineering team productivity by orchestrating structured technical onboarding and knowledge-sharing programs.
Oversaw a massive-scale global Azure portfolio encompassing 5+ enterprise subscriptions and 2500+ virtual machines.
Spearheaded enterprise FinOps initiatives, successfully reducing overall cloud operating expenditure by ~20%.
Enforced global security and compliance baselines by architecting automated enterprise landing zones and policies.
Directed multi-region disaster recovery roadmaps, utilizing Azure Site Recovery to safeguard mission-critical data.
Directed high-availability infrastructure strategy for regulated healthcare systems, reducing operational downtime by 50%.
Governed enterprise IT operations and automated disaster recovery processes for 200+ global end-users.
Managed enterprise IT hardware deployments and infrastructure support operations to ensure seamless client integration.
Delivered critical technical support for enterprise systems, ensuring high availability and strict SLA compliance.

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ-305)

strategic_initiatives.name: Enterprise Cloud Modernization
strategic_initiatives.description: Led the strategic transition of legacy infrastructure to highly scalable Azure cloud environments, driving impactful business transformation.

strategic_initiatives.name: Enterprise FinOps Governance
strategic_initiatives.description: Established comprehensive cost optimization frameworks, enforcing corporate standards to significantly reduce cloud infrastructure waste.
